mission.title: prometheus: Move some of storage config from command line to config file
mission.description: Move some of storage config from command line to config file. Requested by 14+ users.

steps.title: Check current prometheus deployment
steps.description:
Verify your prometheus version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n prometheus -l app.kubernetes.io/name=prometheus
helm list -n prometheus 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working prometheus installation.

steps.title: Review prometheus configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant prometheus configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n prometheus -l app.kubernetes.io/name=prometheus
kubectl get configmap -n prometheus -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=prometheus
```
## Proposal

https://github.com/prometheus/prometheus/pull/8974 introduced a `storage` section in the config file and also added mechanism to reload the config in TSDB without needing a restart.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Move some of storage config from command line to config file
steps.description:
Move storage-related flags into the Prometheus config file under the `storage` section. PR #8974 introduced a `storage` section in the config file and added a mechanism to reload TSDB config without a restart. Migrate the following flags to the config file where supported:
```yaml
# These remote storage flags can be configured via the config file:
--storage.remote.flush-deadline=<duration>
--storage.remote.read-sample-limit=5e7
--storage.remote.read-concurrent-limit=10
--storage.remote.read-max-bytes-in-frame=1048576
```
See PR #9158 for additional TSDB configuration options that can be managed via the config file.

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n prometheus -l app.kubernetes.io/name=prometheus
kubectl get events -n prometheus --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Move some of storage config from command line to config file" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary: This feature request asks to move storage-related configuration from command-line flags to the config file, enabling runtime reconfiguration without restarts. Related work includes PR #9158 for TSDB config and ongoing discussions about config file-based storage settings.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with prometheus installed or the issue environment reproducible.
